name: Xml.Encode

aliases.name: EncodeSettings
aliases.comment:
Settings used by `encodeWith`.

  - `nullValue`: if not `omitNullTag`, encode a `NullNode` like this.
  - `omitNullTag`: if `True`, omit a tag if it has no attributes and
    its only content is a `NullNode`.
aliases.type: { nullValue : String.String, trueValue : String.String, falseValue : String.String, omitNullTag : Basics.Bool, attributeSingleQuoteInsteadOfDouble : Basics.Bool }

values.name: bool
values.comment:
Encode a bool

    bool True |> encode 0
    --> "true"

    bool True |> encode 0
    --> "true"

values.name: cdata
values.comment:
Encode content as CDATA (Character Data) for embedding HTML or other XML content cdata "

This is bold text

" |> encode 0 --> "This is bold text

]]>"

values.name: encode
values.comment: Take a value, then generate a string from it

values.name: encodeWith
values.comment: Take a value, then generate a string from it

values.name: list
values.comment:
Encode a list of nodes, e.g

    import Dict

    list [ object [ ("Root", Dict.empty, null) ], int 5 ] |> encode 0
    --> "<Root></Root>\n5"

values.name: object
values.type: List.List ( String.String, Dict.Dict String.String Xml.Encode.Value, Xml.Encode.Value ) -> Xml.Encode.Value

values.name: objectSafe
values.comment:
Encode an "object" (a tag) only allowing valid tag names

    import Dict
values.type: List.List ( String.String, Dict.Dict String.String Xml.Encode.Value, Xml.Encode.Value ) -> Result.Result String.String Xml.Encode.Value

values.name: string
values.comment:
Encode a string

    string "hello" |> encode 0
    --> "hello"

    string "<hello>" |> encode 0
    --> "<hello>"
